Japanese Tax & Finance Tools (税金・財務ツール)

Japan's tax system can be complex, especially for foreign residents navigating consumption tax (消費税), income tax (所得税), resident tax (住民税), and social insurance contributions. The calculators in this category are designed to give you quick, accurate estimates based on official National Tax Agency (NTA) guidelines and current rates.

Japan Consumption Tax (消費税) — 10% and 8%

Japan's consumption tax has two rates: the standard 10% rate applies to most goods and services, while the reduced 8% rate covers food and non-alcoholic beverages for takeout or delivery, and qualifying newspaper subscriptions. All calculators are updated for the current tax year. Tax rates sourced from the National Tax Agency Japan.
